rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing annex syntax without changing unrelated architecture
generic_rules: Use only valid AGREE syntax and visible identifiers in repairs
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation annexes
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool for const and eq declarations
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Use eq for equations and guarantee for output constraints
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not reference implementation-level features in component type annexes
